brand.name: Kogni
brand.positioning: Kogni is an intelligent learning platform that diagnoses knowledge gaps, builds a skills map, and helps create a data-driven learning plan.

landing.heroTitle: Kogni shows what you truly don't understand yet.
landing.heroSubtitle: Take an AI diagnosis, discover your knowledge gaps, and get a learning plan matched to your level — for math, languages, programming, and many other subjects.
landing.pillar1Desc: A short adaptive test reveals what you actually know and where the gaps are — before you spend time and money on learning.
landing.pillar2Desc: Diagnosis results turn into a clear map of your skills — with strengths and areas to improve.
landing.pillar3Desc: You get concrete recommendations for next steps, matched to your level and goals.
landing.promiseBody: After the diagnosis you receive a measurable knowledge map and a recommended next path — no subjective opinions.
landing.safetyNote: The diagnosis helps identify areas for learning. It does not replace a formal teacher assessment.
landing.headline2: Diagnosis, map, plan — in one place.
landing.howHeadline: Five steps from first sign-in to a measurable learning plan.
landing.step1: Create an account and pick your role
landing.step5: Learn deliberately — with a data-driven plan
landing.footerCtaTitle: See where you really are — in 15 minutes.
landing.footerCtaBody: Free AI diagnosis for any subject — from primary school to university. Math, languages, sciences, humanities, programming. No commitments.
landing.pillarsHeadline: Diagnosis, matching, proof of progress — in one system.

auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.checkEmail: Check your inbox and confirm your email.

roleDescriptions.student: I learn, join circles and use AI.

diagnose.title: AI Diagnosis
diagnose.subtitle: Adaptive 12-question test. AI tunes difficulty and topic on the fly. Works for any subject and level — from primary school to university.
diagnose.domainPlaceholder: e.g. Math, English, Python programming, Organic chemistry…
diagnose.intakeNote: The diagnosis takes ~10–15 minutes. AI generates questions in real time, adapting difficulty to your answers.
diagnose.noStrengths: No clear strengths yet — a great starting point for learning.
diagnose.safetyNote: The diagnosis helps identify areas for learning. It does not replace a formal teacher assessment.
diagnose.initialSubtitle: Diagnosis v1: a short multiple-choice test. The score will initialize the child knowledge map.
diagnose.deterministicNote: Diagnosis v1 is deterministic and does not include AI. The full adaptive AI diagnosis will be added in later stages.
diagnose.resultSubtitleV1: Initial diagnosis v1 completed. The knowledge map has been initialized.
diagnose.v1AiLaterNote: This is initial diagnosis v1. The full adaptive AI diagnosis will be added in later stages.

plan.title: Learning Plan
plan.subtitle: Diagnosis-based plan
plan.generateHelper: Based on the diagnosis, Kogni will prepare a first learning plan with steps and rationale.
plan.whyGenerated: The plan was generated from the diagnosis result.
plan.credibility: The plan was generated from the diagnosis result. You can later review it with a tutor or teacher.
plan.noPlanDesc: Generate a plan after completing a diagnosis.
plan.denied: You don't have access to this plan.

curriculum.note: A full competency graph editor will arrive in upcoming iterations. For now data is seeded via migrations.

smartReadiness.title: SMART evidence readiness
smartReadiness.body: Kogni now supports a universal curriculum and competency graph, enabling traceable diagnosis, planning and progress measurement across multiple educational stages and domains. This forms the foundation for evidence required by grant programs (e.g. FENG SMART Path) and R&D reporting.

traceability.aiAreaNoteChild: This area was detected by AI but is not yet linked to an official competency.
traceability.infoBody: This panel shows whether Kogni diagnostics are structurally linked to the competency graph. This makes it possible to document which knowledge areas were detected, how they were mapped to competencies, and which algorithm version produced the result.

checkpoint.checkProgressHelper: Kogni will run a short follow-up diagnosis and compare it with your baseline.
checkpoint.notEligible: Complete at least 3 plan steps to check progress.
checkpoint.modeNote: This is a checkpoint diagnosis tied to your learning plan.
checkpoint.reportSubtitle: Comparison between baseline and checkpoint diagnoses

interpretation.strong_improvement: Clear improvement compared to the baseline. The plan is working.
interpretation.modest_improvement: Small but measurable improvement. Worth continuing.
interpretation.stable: Result stayed at a similar level. This is normal early in learning.
interpretation.slight_regression: Result dropped slightly. Review the weaker areas.
interpretation.regression: Result dropped noticeably. Consider revisiting basics before moving on.
interpretation.neutral_no_baseline: No baseline diagnosis available for comparison.

checkpoint.denied: You don't have access to this report.
checkpoint.credibility: This report is based on structured diagnostic data, without subjective judgment.
checkpoint.finalizeError: Could not finalize the checkpoint. Please try again.

expertReview.denied: You do not have access to this review.
expertReview.notesPlaceholder: Reviewer notes visible to the user after submission (if safe)
expertReview.credibility: Expert review strengthens credibility and safety of AI recommendations.
expertReview.assignmentNote: Reviews are created and assigned to the current admin. Other reviewers cannot access user data without explicit assignment.

errors.noOwner: Source has no owner – review cannot be created.

research.subtitle: Data for validating Kogni's effectiveness, R&D documentation, and SMART/FENG reports.

adminLink.hint: Open the research panel and export the SMART evidence report.

readiness.title: SMART evidence readiness
readiness.disclaimer: This is an internal heuristic, not an official grant score.

demo.title: Demo checklist
demo.subtitle: A short end-to-end path to walk through the Kogni research loop.

grantPack.title: Grant Documentation Pack
grantPack.subtitle: Structured description of Kogni's innovation, R&D components, risks, KPIs, and validation data.
grantPack.noPilotData: No pilot data yet — this document describes the architecture and validation plan.

adminLink.hint: Open the structured documentation pack for FENG / SMART Path.

grantPack.disclaimer: This document is internal grant-preparation material. It does not guarantee funding, is not official legal advice, and the readiness score is an internal heuristic.

researchConsent.legalDisclaimer: This text is a draft and does not constitute final legal documentation. Final terms will be reviewed by counsel before public launch.

ai_diagnosis_notice.title: AI Diagnosis — data usage notice
ai_diagnosis_notice.body: Kogni uses AI to estimate your knowledge level, identify gaps, and propose learning paths. Your answers are stored to build your skill map and improve your personal recommendations.
ai_diagnosis_notice.details:
What we store: your answers, AI-generated skill estimates, and the diagnosis result.
Why: to build your personal skill map and learning plan.
Who can see it: only you, and admins for support purposes.
You can withdraw at any time from Settings.

research_participation.title: Research participation (optional)
research_participation.body: I consent to the use of my educational data for diagnosis, learning plan generation, progress measurement, and anonymized analysis of Kogni's effectiveness. Data may be used in aggregated form for product validation and research and development work. This consent does not replace formal legal documentation and may be withdrawn.
research_participation.details: Anonymized aggregates may be used for: product validation, R&D reporting, and grant documentation. No personal identifiers are exported. Withdrawal stops future inclusion in aggregates.

parent_child_data_processing.title: Parent/child data processing
parent_child_data_processing.body: I consent to the processing of my child's educational data (diagnosis answers, mastery estimates, learning plan progress) on Kogni, as the legal guardian.
parent_child_data_processing.details:
What we store: child's diagnosis answers, AI estimates, learning plan, and progress.
Who can see it: you as the parent, your child if linked, and admins for support.
Legal basis: parental consent. You can withdraw at any time.

expert_review_notice.title: Expert review notice
expert_review_notice.body: I understand that an expert may review AI-generated assessments to validate the system. Reviews are stored as part of Kogni's quality and research process.
expert_review_notice.details: Expert reviewers see assessment payloads tied to your diagnosis but receive no contact information.

terms_of_service.title: Terms of Service (draft)
terms_of_service.body: I accept the draft Terms of Service of Kogni.
terms_of_service.details: Draft terms are available on request. Final terms will be published before public launch.

privacy_policy.title: Privacy Policy (draft)
privacy_policy.body: I accept the draft Privacy Policy of Kogni.
privacy_policy.details: Draft policy describes data we collect, why, and how to withdraw. Final version will be reviewed by counsel.

lesson_transcription_notice.title: Lesson transcription — notice
lesson_transcription_notice.body: I consent to live transcription of the lesson so that the tutor and Kogni AI can create notes, summaries, and learning recommendations.
lesson_transcription_notice.details:
What we store: text transcripts of utterances, timestamps, language.
Who can see it: the lesson tutor, you, and admins for support.
Use: lesson notes, AI summaries, learning recommendations.
You can withdraw at any time — past transcripts can be deleted on request.

lesson_engagement_analysis_notice.title: Engagement signals — notice
lesson_engagement_analysis_notice.body: I consent to recording approximate engagement signals (focus, confusion, satisfaction) during the lesson. Signals are visible only to the tutor and are not a psychological or medical diagnosis.
lesson_engagement_analysis_notice.details:
What we store: signal type, timestamp, optional confidence score.
Who can see it: the lesson tutor and admins.
Use: helping the tutor adjust the lesson.
Not a diagnosis. You can withdraw at any time.

ai_copilot_notice.title: AI co-pilot — notice
ai_copilot_notice.body: I consent to the tutor using an AI co-pilot during the lesson, which receives lesson context (transcript, notes) to suggest questions, exercises, and explanations.
ai_copilot_notice.details:
What we send to AI: lesson transcript and tutor notes (no contact details).
Who sees co-pilot answers: the tutor.
Use: assist the tutor — final pedagogical decisions belong to the tutor.
You can withdraw at any time.

consent.alreadyConfirmed: AI diagnosis consent is already confirmed.
consent.requiredAiDiagnosis: To start an AI diagnosis you must accept the AI diagnosis notice.
consent.declined: You declined. You can revisit this later.
consent.lessonBody: I consent to using lesson transcription and engagement signals only to create notes, summaries, educational recommendations, and improve learning quality. Engagement signals are not psychological or medical diagnosis.

bookingCreatedTutor.title: New booking
bookingCreatedTutor.body: You have a new session booking.

paymentProofUploaded.title: Payment proof uploaded
paymentProofUploaded.body: The student uploaded a payment proof — review and confirm.

sessionCompleted.title: Session completed
sessionCompleted.body: The session has been marked as completed.

tutorNote.title: New session note
tutorNote.body: The tutor added a note for your session.

lessonNote.title: Tutor added a lesson note
lessonNote.body: Open the lesson room to read it.

sessionStarted.title: Lesson is starting
sessionStarted.body: Your tutor started the live lesson.

sessionRoomReady.title: Lesson room is ready
sessionRoomReady.body: You can now enter the live lesson room.

lessonSummary.title: Lesson summary is ready
lessonSummary.body: Your tutor approved the lesson summary.

dashboardBooking.emptyDesc: Once you book a session it will appear here.
dashboardBooking.weakAreasHint: A tutor can help you with the weak areas in your current learning plan.

adminBooking.note: Marketplace counters use the same SMART evidence pipeline as diagnosis and plans.

homework.title: Homework
homework.subtitle: Targeted practice for your weak areas — auto-graded.
homework.tutorSubtitle: Assignments linked to your students and sessions.
homework.noItems: This assignment has no questions yet.
homework.answerHint: Answer the questions and submit to get auto-graded feedback.
homework.shortAnswerNotice: Short-answer questions will be reviewed by your tutor.
homework.emptyDesc: Generate your first practice assignment to start closing knowledge gaps.
homework.emptyTutorDesc: Create an assignment from a session note or a learning plan item.
homework.emptyAdminTitle: No assignments in the system yet.

dashboardHomework.title: Homework
dashboardHomework.emptyDesc: Generate practice from your weak areas.
dashboardHomework.weakAreasHint: We spotted weak areas — generate practice to close the gap.

homeworkToast.missingTutor: Only the tutor of this booking can do this.
homeworkToast.missingPermission: You don't have access to this assignment.
homeworkToast.noContext: No weak area found yet — take a diagnosis first.

liveLesson.lobbyBody: Check the details and join the lesson room.
liveLesson.paymentWarning: Payment is not confirmed yet — you can still join, but please complete payment.
liveLesson.noteEmpty: Tutor has not added a note yet.
liveLesson.tokenError: Could not connect to live room.
liveLesson.notFoundBody: This booking does not exist or you do not have access.
liveLesson.forbiddenBody: You are not a participant of this booking.

errors.not_found_or_forbidden: Booking not found or access denied

livekit.setupRequiredBody: Live video integration is not set up yet. Please contact support.

lessonIntel.title: Lesson Intelligence
lessonIntel.subtitle: Live-lesson features: transcription, engagement signals, AI co-pilot, summaries.
lessonIntel.consentBanner: Accept consent to enable this feature.
lessonIntel.disclaimerNotDiagnosis: AI outputs are assistive and are not a diagnosis.
lessonIntel.tutorWaitingForLearnerConsent: Lesson intelligence is disabled — the student or guardian has not granted consent yet.

transcription.title: Lesson transcription
transcription.browserUnsupported: Your browser doesn't support speech recognition. Use Chrome or Edge.
transcription.panelEmpty: No transcript yet. Start to begin.
transcription.consentNeeded: Student consent is required to record their speech.

engagement.title: Engagement signals
engagement.disclaimer: Signals are approximate and may be wrong. They are not a diagnosis.
engagement.noData: No signals. You can mark an observation manually.

copilot.title: AI Co-pilot
copilot.placeholder: Ask a question during the lesson…
copilot.empty: Ask a question to get a suggestion.
copilot.rateLimited: Rate limit reached. Try again shortly.
copilot.noCredits: AI credits unavailable. Contact your admin.

lessonSummary.title: Lesson summary
lessonSummary.empty: No summary yet. Click to generate.
lessonSummary.onlyTutorApprove: Only the tutor can approve the summary.
lessonSummary.pendingApprovalForStudent: The summary will be shared after the tutor approves it.
lessonSummary.generationError: Could not generate the lesson summary. Please try again.

flashcards.title: Flashcards
flashcards.subtitle: Review what you learned in your lessons.
flashcards.studyComplete: All caught up — no cards due.

availability.title: Your availability
availability.subtitle: Set the recurring weekly windows when students can book lessons. Slots repeat every week.
availability.empty: You don't have any availability windows yet. Add your first one above.
availability.hint: Each window will be split into 60-minute bookable slots.
availability.invalidRange: Start time must be before end time.

studentAi.disclaimer: Your private learning helper. Does not replace the tutor.
studentAi.empty: Ask a question to get started.
studentAi.placeholder: What do you want to ask?
studentAi.forbidden: Student assistant is not available to the tutor.

adminOrgs.title: Organizations
adminOrgs.subtitle: Manage school and training-company accounts.
adminOrgs.empty: No organizations yet. Create the first one.

orgPage.title: Organization
orgPage.phaseANote: This is a minimal organization dashboard (Phase A). Full cohorts, members, and reports come in Phase B.
orgPage.phaseBStub: This view will be completed in Phase B.

orgProgress.title: Organization progress

attention.noPlan: {{cohort}} — diagnostics done, no learning plan yet.

orgProgress.privacyNote: Aggregate metrics only. No personal data is shown.

orgReports.title: Organization reports
orgReports.privacyNote: Reports contain anonymized aggregate metrics only — no emails, names, or raw transcripts.

i18nParity.title: PL/EN/ES parity
i18nParity.description: All translation keys present across three locales.

routeGuards.title: Route guards
routeGuards.action: Manual test: student visiting /admin/* should redirect.

rlsSanity.title: RLS policies
rlsSanity.description: User data is visible only to its owner.
rlsSanity.action: Manual test: account B cannot see account A's data.

privateStorage.title: Private buckets
privateStorage.description: payment-proofs is private; avatars is public intentionally.

signedProofUrls.title: Signed payment-proof URLs
signedProofUrls.description: Proofs are fetched via createSignedUrl, not public URLs.
signedProofUrls.action: Open a proof from the calendar and inspect the URL.

noPiiExports.title: No PII in exports
noPiiExports.description: Org/SMART/grant pack reports never include names or emails.

legalReview.title: Legal documents
legalReview.description: Privacy policy, terms and GDPR docs require legal review.

livekitEnv.title: LiveKit configuration
livekitEnv.action: If warning — add secrets in Lovable Cloud.

edgeFunctions.title: Edge functions deployed
edgeFunctions.description: Lesson, homework, plan, and diagnostic functions deployed.
edgeFunctions.action: Deployment is automatic. Check logs on failure.

pilotCohort.title: Pilot cohort created
pilotCohort.description: At least one cohort created in an organization.
pilotCohort.action: Create a cohort in the org panel.

firstOrg.title: First organization created
firstOrg.description: At least one organization in the system.

testUsers.title: Test users ready
testUsers.description: At least two accounts created for end-to-end tests.
testUsers.action: Create student + parent + tutor + admin accounts.

adminOverview.title: Admin overview
adminOverview.subtitle: Platform health, attention items, and quick links to every admin module.

adminMarketplace.title: Marketplace operations
adminMarketplace.subtitle: Tutors, bookings, payments, and lesson activity at a glance.

adminCurriculum.title: Curriculum & competency graph
adminCurriculum.subtitle: Universal curriculum coverage at a glance.
adminCurriculum.note: Source of truth for diagnostics, plans, and reporting.

adminExpertReviews.title: Expert reviews
adminExpertReviews.subtitle: Reviewer queue, AI–expert agreement, and corrections.
